project_description: Move procurement completion from quote-level to per-invoice (КП поставщика). Replace single «Завершить закупку» button on the quote with per-КП «Завершить закупку по КП». Each invoice locks independently when completed; remaining invoices stay editable. Customs queries get re-grouped by invoice. Logistics already filters per-invoice. Quote-level status becomes derived («3/5 КП завершено» badge). Re-open flow stays as-is, just scoped per-invoice.
